description_long: This is a modern, multi-story bungalow with a flat, green roof featuring solar panels and rooftop gardens. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines with extensive use of wood paneling and large blue-tinted glass windows, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The upper floor includes a pergola-covered terrace with lush greenery, while the lower levels have open balconies and a partially enclosed garage area. The property is surrounded by a low white fence and a manicured lawn, with stepping stones leading to the main entrance. The design incorporates sustainable elements such as green roofing and solar panels, blending natural and built environments. The overall appearance is sleek, eco-friendly, and designed for urban luxury living.
description: A modern, multi-story bungalow with flat green roofs, solar panels, large blue windows, and wood paneling, featuring rooftop gardens and open terraces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the layered green roofs, large blue windows, and the open garage area at the base, with the rooftop garden and pergola visible on the right.
description_view_1: The front view showcases the main entrance, symmetrical terraces, and the pergola-covered rooftop garden, with the white fence and stepping stones leading up to the house.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the extensive rooftop garden with a wooden trellis, the large flat roofs, and the open balcony spaces along the length of the building.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the blue-tinted windows, green roof sections, and the back terrace, with the white fence and manicured lawn visible at the base.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
